title: Johnson Controls (JCI) Reports Next Week: Wall Street Expects Earnings Growth

title: Johnson Controls Announces Third Quarter 2022 Earnings Conference Call Webcast
text: CORK, Ireland , July 11, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Johnson Controls International plc (NYSE: JCI) announces the following webcast:  What: Johnson Controls Third Quarter Fiscal 2022 Earnings Conference Call When: Thursday, August 4, 2022 at 8:30 a.m. EDT How: The conference call for investors can be accessed in the following ways: Live via webcast at http://investors.johnsoncontrols.com/news-and-events/events-and-presentations Note: A slide presentation will be available that morning for downloading.

title: Johnson Controls 38-year Veteran Jeff Williams to Retire as President of Global Products
text: Jeff Williams will retire effective Aug. 1, 2022. A global search for his successor is underway as Johnson Controls accelerates its focus on technology-driven solutions for buildings management to make assets smarter, healthier and more sustainable.

title: Is Johnson Controls Stock Undervalued At $50?
text: After a 39% fall year-to-date, at the current levels, we believe Johnson Controls stock (NYSE: JCI) is undervalued. JCI stock fell from $79 in early January to $49 now.
